next_stage_options_best_to_worst.why: Find remaining legacy executor paths that bypass resolver/BTS/pre/post gates now that HITL, OWASP, and checkpoint controls exist.
Make BTS and checkpoint spans more compatible with OpenTelemetry/Agents SDK trace semantics.

stop_conditions: Do not export full OS unless explicitly requested and budget-approved.
Do not resume from chat-only checkpoint claims.
Run exactly one bounded stage next turn.

support_bundle.label: SUPPORT/PROOF BUNDLE — NOT THE OS BUNDLE
